mapper.select: SELECT * FROM volunteer_task WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM volunteer_task WHERE task_type = #{taskType} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM volunteer_task WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM volunteer_task WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteer_task WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM volunteer_task WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer_task SET status = #{status} WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE volunteer_task SET current_count = current_count + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM volunteer_task WHERE status = 1 AND start_time >= NOW() ORDER BY start_time ASC
SELECT * FROM volunteer_task ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT vt.* FROM volunteer_task vt INNER JOIN volunteer_task_record vtr ON vt.task_id = vtr.task_id WHERE vtr.user_id = #{volunteerUserId} ORDER BY vt.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE volunteer_task SET current_count = current_count + 1 WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE volunteer_task SET status = 3 WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM volunteer_task WHERE shelter_id = #{shelterId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM volunteer_task WHERE start_time >= #{startDate} AND end_time <= #{endDate} ORDER BY start_time ASC
